title: Locator Colors
description: This mod grabs the colors from player waypoints on the locator bar and applies them everywhere, so you can always tell who is who at a glance.
body:
# Locator Colors

Locator Colors is a client-side mod that grabs the colors from player waypoints and applies them everywhere, so you can always tell who is who at a glance.

## Features
- **Colored Chat & Tab Menu:** Player names in chat and the player list will automatically match their assigned waypoint color.
- **Colored Name Tags:** The nameplate floating above a player's character in the world will match their waypoint color.
- **Better Locator Markers:** Open the player list to display player heads instead of dots, surrounded by a border of their waypoint color.
- **Fully Customizable:** Don't like one of the features? Every single feature can be turned on or off individually through the config screen.

---
